rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, moving the contribution earlier and grouping methods together.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainties such as the 'first cross-predictor benchmark' claim and potential training cutoff issues, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, addressing all specified dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent adds safety notes to prevent misuse and softens claims to avoid harm, with no regressions identified.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes are traced, minor edits lack annotation, falling short of full traceability.
